raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lankâ dshwoja/ un kuxra Sar-
rôs tee Putni appakſch Debbe-
fim Ligsdus darrija/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas pats eſſi tu Keh-
ninſch/ kaſtu leels un ſtiprs tap-
pis/ jo tawa Augſtiba irr ta au-
guſt/ ka ta lihds Debbefim ſnee-
dsahs/ un tawa Waldſchana eet
lihds Semmes Gallam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka nu tas Kehninſch
weenu Waktneeku / weenu
Swehtu redſejs no Debbefim
nahkam/ un ſakam: Nozehrteet
to Kohku/ un famaitajt wiꞥſch/
tomehr pametteet to Zelina ar
fawahin Saknehm eekſch Sem-
mes/ bet wiꞥſch lai ar Warra
un Dſelseß Pinneklem mihſtâ
Sahle paleek / ka wiꞥſch no
Debbes Raﬀas tohp flazzinahts/
un winna Dalta lai irr ar teem
Swehreem wirß Semmes/ tee-
kans ſeptini Laiki pahe wiꞥſch
veidsahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sci irr ta Iſſtahſticha-
na/ Kungß Kehninſch / un ſcis
irr ta Wiſſu-augſtaka Padohmß/
kaſ pahe mannu Kungu to Keh-
ninu nahks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tu tapſi no Zilwekeem
atſtumts/ un dshwoſt pee teem
Swehreem Laukâ / un tew taps
Sahle tapatt ka Wehrsbeemi
ehſt dohta/ un tu tapſi no Deb-
bes Raﬀas flazzinahts/ un tad
ſeptini Laiki pahe tew beigfees/
teekams tu atſihſti/ka tain Wiſſu-
augſtakam Warra irr pahe to
Zilweku Walſtibahm / un tam
dohd/ lain grilbedams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet ta fazziths irr/ta r
Zelina ar ta Kohka Saknehm
buhs eekſch Semmes paneſt/ ta-
wa Walſtiba paliks tew pastah-
wiga/ kad tu buhſi atſunnis/ k-
tas Deewß no Debbes walda.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht Kungs Kehninſch
leezers tew mannu Padohnu pa-
tiktees/ un mittejees no taweet
Greheem zaur Taifutibu/ un n-
taweem Noseegumeem zau-
Scheblastibu pee teem Nabba-
geem/raugi/ tad tawa meerig-
Buhſchana taps wehl ilgaki pa-
wilzinata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas wits usgabje ta-
Kehnimam NebukadNezaraim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo pehz diwipadefmit
Mehnescheem/ kad wiꞥſch us
Kehnixa Pilli Babelê staigaja
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Runnaja tas Kehninſch
un fazzija : Woj fchi ne irr ta le-
la Babele/ ko es eſmu uſtaiffi
par Kehnixa Namnu zaue ma-
nas Warras Stiprumu/un p-
mannas Augſtibas Gohdibu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schis Wahrdß bija we-
ta Kehnixa Muttê / tad kri-
weena Balfs no Debbefim: Te-
Kehnix NebukadNezar tohp ſa-
zihts: Tawa Waldſchana irr
tewim atjeunta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tu tapſi no Zilweke-
atſtumts/ un tawa Dshwo-
buhs pee teem Swehreem La-
tâ/ tew taws Sahle ehſt do-
ka Wehrscheem / un ta beig-
ſeptini Laiki/ teekams tu atſih-
ea tam Wiſſu-augſtakam pa-
tahut Zilweku Walſtibahm W
"
    }
  ],
